parameters.text:
=📊 *Weekly Social Media Report* ({{ $json.period.from }} → {{ $json.period.to }})

*Instagram:* {{ $json.instagram.posts }} posts | {{ $json.instagram.totalReach }} reach | {{ $json.instagram.totalLikes }} likes | {{ $json.instagram.totalComments }} comments
🔥 Top: {{ $json.instagram.topPost }}

*Twitter:* {{ $json.twitter.tweets }} tweets | {{ $json.twitter.totalImpressions }} impressions | {{ $json.twitter.totalEngagements }} engagements

*LinkedIn:* {{ $json.linkedin.impressions }} impressions | {{ $json.linkedin.clicks }} clicks | {{ $json.linkedin.engagement.toFixed(2) }}% engagement rate

meta.description: Weekly automated report: pulls Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn analytics, aggregates into a formatted digest, sends to Slack/email
